SEO.Title: AI, Frontend & Developer Tooling
SEO.Description: Independent engineer in Berlin building thoughtful product experiences, AI agents, and developer tooling with strong frontend craft.

Hero.Name: Felix Leupold
Hero.Statement: I design and engineer thoughtful product experiences, AI agents, and developer tools.
Hero.Lead: My work sits where interface taste, system design, and shipping discipline meet. I build everything from fast product surfaces to code generation pipelines and agent workflows that help teams move with confidence.
Hero.Availability: Available for selected freelance, product, and prototyping collaborations.
Hero.ProfileTitle: Independent product engineer with frontend taste and systems depth.
Hero.ProfileText: Still deeply grounded in UI craft, accessibility, and interaction design. Now also focused on agent workflows, AI-assisted tooling, SDK design, and developer experience.
FocusList: Agent workflows and AI product surfaces
TypeScript, React, and modern web architecture
SDK design, codegen, and platform ergonomics

Capabilities.Title: Frontend craft for the AI era.
Capabilities.Text: I still care deeply about performance, motion, accessibility, and the fine details of interface design. The difference now is that I bring that same rigor to AI products, internal tools, SDKs, and platform work.

Items.Title: AI & Agent Engineering
Items.Text: Designing agent flows, code-aware tooling, human-in-the-loop workflows, and product surfaces that make powerful automation feel understandable.

Items.Title: Product UI & Frontend Systems
Items.Text: Building responsive, resilient interfaces with strong information architecture, fast feedback loops, and design details that hold up in real products.

Items.Title: Developer Tooling & Platform DX
Items.Text: Improving how teams build: from CLI ergonomics and internal tools to code generation, component systems, and workflows that remove friction.

Items.Title: Design-Sensitive Execution
Items.Text: Bridging product thinking and engineering craft so that ambitious ideas ship with polish, clarity, and technical durability.

Projects.Title: Signals from code, tooling, and open source.
Projects.Text: A mix of long-running OSS, interaction-focused libraries, and newer systems work that points toward product engineering for the AI era.

Items.Title: claude-code
Items.Description: An independent Python feature-port exploring CLI architecture, workflow ergonomics, and agentic developer tooling.

Items.Title: sdk-codegen
Items.Description: SDK generation work focused on turning complex APIs into coherent, maintainable developer experiences.

Items.Title: embla-carousel-wheel-gestures
Items.Description: A wheel interaction plugin that turns motion nuance and product feel into reusable infrastructure.

Items.Title: use-location-state
Items.Description: Hooks for syncing UI state with browser history, built around modern React ergonomics and durable product behavior.

Approach.Title: Thoughtful systems beat noisy complexity.
Approach.Intro: The best product engineering makes sophisticated systems feel calm. That applies just as much to AI products and internal tooling as it does to consumer-facing interfaces.
Approach.StoryText: I started by obsessing over interaction design, animation, and frontend clarity. That foundation still shapes how I build AI experiences today: clear information architecture, calm states, reliable behavior, and tooling that respects the people using it.

Items.Title: Prototype quickly, shape deliberately
Items.Text: I like getting to something tangible fast, then refining structure, language, and constraints until the product feels inevitable instead of accidental.

Items.Title: Respect the operator
Items.Text: Whether the user is a customer, a teammate, or an internal power user, I optimize for clarity, trust, and control instead of cleverness for its own sake.

Items.Title: Ship systems, not demos
Items.Text: I care about maintainability, edge cases, accessibility, and workflow fit so the result can survive beyond the exciting first prototype.

Contact.Title: If you need a sharp product partner for AI, frontend, or developer experience work, let's talk.
Contact.Text: Available for select collaborations across product design, prototyping, platform work, and engineering-heavy experiments.

Footer.Title: Open for thoughtful product work.
Footer.Text: AI agents, frontend systems, developer tooling, and products that need both taste and technical depth.
